items.final_wording: Supports documenting pertinent medical records, patient interview, directed physical examination, airway evaluation, and lung and heart examination before elective anesthesia.

source.title: Practice Advisory for Preanesthesia Evaluation: An Updated Report by the American Society of Anesthesiologists Task Force on Preanesthesia Evaluation
source.population: Patients of all ages scheduled for elective general anesthesia, regional anesthesia, or moderate or deep sedation.
source.setting: Preanesthesia history, physical examination, selective testing, and consultation for elective procedures.
source.exclusions: Exact for medical-record review, patient interview, directed airway, lung and heart examination, and selective testing including pregnancy testing when results would alter management. It is an older advisory, excludes urgent or emergency care, and does not generate tests or management.

exact_location.heading: Appendix 1 - Preanesthesia history and physical examination

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting pertinent medical records, patient interview, directed physical examination, airway evaluation, and lung and heart examination before elective anesthesia.

items.rationale: The ASA advisory supports pertinent record review, respiratory history, directed airway and lung examination, and clinician-selected existing tests without generating a respiratory diagnosis or investigation.

items.final_wording: Supports record review, patient or family interview, airway examination, prior airway difficulty, OSA symptoms, sleep-study results, and severity documentation.

source.title: Practice Guidelines for the Perioperative Management of Patients with Obstructive Sleep Apnea
source.population: Adult and pediatric patients older than 1 year with suspected or established obstructive sleep apnea in perioperative settings.
source.setting: Preoperative, intraoperative, and postoperative anesthesia care.
source.exclusions: Exact for record review, patient or family interview, airway examination, prior airway difficulty, OSA symptoms and studies, severity, procedure, and opioid-related risk context. Treatment and disposition recommendations are not mapped.

exact_location.heading: Preoperative evaluation for suspected or established OSA

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports record review, patient or family interview, airway examination, prior airway difficulty, OSA symptoms, sleep-study results, and severity documentation.

items.rationale: The OSA-specific section was reviewed but not mapped because the broad respiratory-risk workflow does not establish suspected or diagnosed OSA.
